steps.title: Rewrite the inequality for y
steps.content: Start with $2x-y\gt 883$. Subtract $2x$ from both sides: $$-y\gt 883-2x.$$ Divide by $-1$ and reverse the inequality: $$y\lt2x-883.$$

steps.title: Find the needed y-values
steps.content: For the three $x$-values in the tables: when $x=440$, $y\lt-3$; when $x=441$, $y\lt-1$; and when $x=442$, $y\lt1$.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: The correct table pairs $x=442$ and $x=663$ with output values that satisfy the equation. The other tables mismatch at least one listed row, so D is correct.
